# Beacon Point
> Beacon Point is a private, non-clinical care navigation service in Sarasota, Florida.
> We provide a 14-day Hospital-to-Home Transition Package ($2,750 fixed price) that
> coordinates post-discharge logistics for older adults and their families.
> We are not a medical provider, home care agency, or clinical practice.
> Founded by Megan Martin, MPH.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://beaconpointcare.com/): Overview of service, pricing, how to start

## Key facts
- Location: Sarasota, Florida (also serves Lakewood Ranch, Bradenton, Venice, Longboat Key)
- Service: 14-day Hospital-to-Home Transition Package
- Price: $2,750 fixed fee
- Founder credential: Master of Public Health (MPH)
- Non-clinical coordination only
- Phone: (941) 385-5872
- Email: megan@beaconpointcare.com
